title: Meetings and Correspondence on the development of new regulatory guidance for novel foods, focused on plant breeding - Canada.ca
content:
## Meetings and correspondence on the development of new regulatory guidance for novel foods, focused on plant breeding
Find out about communications with stakeholders in regards to the development of new regulatory guidance about novel foods, focused on plant breeding.
The documents listed in the table are available upon request, for the sole purpose of ensuring greater transparency. The table will be posted for 2 years. Disclosures made as part of our transparency policy are not part of the consultation process. We are therefore not seeking any feedback on any of these documents.
We publish links to external sites in the language in which they were submitted to us. They are not subject to the Official Languages Act .
